3072440.name: Infinite Rebirth
3072440.description:
This is a delightful entertainment game!

You will click on one colorful small block after another to eliminate them, and new blocks will be generated before continuing to eliminate them

Every time you successfully eliminate a block, a new block will appear, and you can also think about how to click to eliminate a large block

The entire game screen is rich and colorful, full of vitality, and the background music is vivid and dynamic, adding more fun to your gaming experience! Be prepared to face challenges and become the fastest consumer entertainment player
3072440.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
